vc_checking.summary: The only target witness is semantically proofable. Both disjuncts are identical. After selecting one disjunct and unfolding the current-case definition xizi_dll_empty, the postcondition is definitionally the same two-field separating conjunction already present in the precondition.

vc_shape.pre_spatial: For an arbitrary non-null linklist_head_pre, ownership of the node_next field storing linklist_head_pre, separated from ownership of the node_prev field storing linklist_head_pre.
vc_shape.post_spatial: One of two identical disjuncts, each requiring xizi_dll_empty linklist_head_pre. Unfolding xizi_dll_empty yields exactly the same node_next and node_prev points-to resources as the precondition.
vc_shape.post_pure: No additional pure proposition inside either entailment branch.

witness_analyses.witness_instantiation: There is no existential witness. Choose the left branch of the outer disjunction; the right branch is identical and would work equally well.
witness_analyses.space_plan: Introduce linklist_head_pre and PreH1, choose the left disjunct, unfold xizi_dll_empty, then close the reflexive spatial entailment by the standard structural cancellation tactic. The node_next points-to resource matches the first conjunct and the node_prev points-to resource matches the second conjunct with the same addresses, field types, and stored value.
witness_analyses.pure_plan: No pure fact is needed after branch selection. PreH1 is available but unused because the entailment is an exact spatial identity.

premise_discharge.obligation: Select a constructor of the outer disjunction.
premise_discharge.discharged_by: Choose the left branch; both branches contain the identical universally quantified entailment.

premise_discharge.obligation: Provide the node_next field ownership required by xizi_dll_empty linklist_head_pre.
premise_discharge.discharged_by: The first spatial conjunct of the VC precondition is the identical points-to assertion.

premise_discharge.obligation: Provide the node_prev field ownership required by xizi_dll_empty linklist_head_pre.
premise_discharge.discharged_by: The second spatial conjunct of the VC precondition is the identical points-to assertion.
No helper or existing theorem is required; xizi_dll_empty is unfolded definitionally and the remaining entailment is reflexive.

witness_analyses.grouping_reason: This sole witness is a direct predicate-unfolding and spatial-identity proof, so it forms one coherent group.

natural_language_analysis.overall: Write the goal as P |-- Q inside either disjunct. P owns head.node_next |-> head ** head.node_prev |-> head. Q is xizi_dll_empty head. The current case lib defines Q to be exactly P. Thus select one identical disjunct, introduce the universal variables, delta-reduce xizi_dll_empty, and use structural cancellation/reflexivity. No information is missing from the annotation and no helper lemma is needed.
natural_language_analysis.countermodel_pattern: none: every heap satisfying P satisfies the unfolded Q by definition
